prompts: Apply SDeltaPhi-32. Determine whether this intervention preserves rollback, exception re-entry, editability, and avoids replacement closure.
Apply SDeltaPhi-32. Did the intervention reopen a path or install a new non-editable default?
Apply SDeltaPhi-32. Is the intervention justified by a declared good while narrowing re-entry and local autonomy?
Apply SDeltaPhi-32. Classify authority as direct intervention authority, diagnostic authority, interpretive awareness, or no authority.
Apply SDeltaPhi-32. Identify the earliest non-action node where recognized closure, available authority, rollback availability, and withheld action coincide.
Apply SDeltaPhi-32 to a reserve-force intensification case. Do not determine legal responsibility first. Audit rollback preservation, exception re-entry, editability, and replacement closure risk.
